description_md:
As a workspace admin, I want to set up a Salesforce connector via a guided wizard so that I can ingest Account/Opportunity records into the platform.

**Background**

The Salesforce connector is the first external data source integration in the Connector Framework module. This setup wizard provides a guided experience for workspace admins to configure authentication, select objects, and establish the initial connection without requiring technical expertise. It lays the foundation for automated data synchronization and subsequent PII auto-tagging capabilities.

**Acceptance Criteria**

1. Workspace admin can enter Salesforce credentials (Client ID, Client Secret, Refresh Token) through a secure form with input validation
2. Wizard validates the Salesforce connection by performing an OAuth token exchange and displaying success/failure status
3. Admin can select which Salesforce objects to sync (Account, Opportunity) with a preview of available fields
4. Upon completion, the connector appears in the Connector Health Monitor with status "Active" and shows the last sync timestamp

comments.author: dev1@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Implementation complete. Wizard uses the new OAuth2 flow and stores credentials encrypted in the vault. Ready for QA.

comments.author: qa1@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Tested with sandbox Salesforce org. All 4 ACs pass. Connection validation correctly handles invalid credentials with user-friendly error message. Connector Health Monitor shows correct status after setup.
